creator: avatar4d@gmail.com
text: Can't we revert libtorrent-rasterbar/py-libtorrent-rasterbar to the last working version so deluge can build again while we wait for the upstream fix rather than leave things broken? As it stands, pkg upgrade will remove deluge from a working system with the default /etc/pkg/FreeBSD.conf. If that happens they have to revert pkg config to release_1 to reinstall where they remain stuck in upgrade purgatory without playing some pkg lock games.
